name: 7 up Bundt Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream sugar and margarine until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Gradually add flour, mixing thoroughly.
4. Stir in lemon juice and 7 Up.
5. Pour batter into a greased and floured Bundt pan.
6. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
